# VisorUp — Motorcycle Adventures Across Britain
> The definitive motorcycle touring resource for the UK and Channel Islands. Curated routes, destination guides, ferry information, bike setup guides, interactive route planner, and AI trip planning.

## About
VisorUp is a premium motorcycle touring platform focused exclusively on Britain and the Channel Islands. We provide curated multi-day routes with GPX downloads, in-depth destination guides, ferry booking information, bike-specific touring setup guides, and interactive planning tools. Our content is written by riders, for riders — honest, opinionated, and tested on real British roads.

## Website
https://visorup.co.uk

## Curated Motorcycle Routes (with GPX downloads)
- Island To Highlands: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/island-to-highlands — 14-day flagship route, Guernsey to Scottish Highlands, 1,880 miles
- Scottish Highlands Loop: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/scottish-highlands-loop — 7 days, 650 miles, circular from Inverness
- NC500 Complete: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/nc500-complete — 6 days, 516 miles, full North Coast 500 circuit
- Welsh Mountain Passes: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/welsh-mountain-passes — 5 days, 480 miles, Snowdonia to Brecon Beacons
- Lake District Ultimate: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/lake-district-ultimate — 4 days, 280 miles, England's steepest passes
- Channel Islands Explorer: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/channel-islands-explorer — 5 days, 120 miles, Jersey and Guernsey
- Coastal Cornwall: https://visorup.co.uk/routes/coastal-cornwall — 4 days, 350 miles, Atlantic Highway to Land's End

## Destination Guides
- Isle of Skye: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/isle-of-skye — Otherworldly landscapes and Britain's most dramatic roads
- Glencoe: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/glencoe — Scotland's most dramatic valley and Highland gateway
- North Coast 500: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/nc500 — 516 miles of wild Highland coastline
- Lake District: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/lake-district — England's steepest passes and most beautiful lakes
- Yorkshire Dales: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/yorkshire-dales — Rolling green valleys, stone walls, Ribblehead Viaduct
- Snowdonia: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/snowdonia — Wales' highest peaks and mountain passes
- Brecon Beacons: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/brecon-beacons — Black Mountain Pass and waterfall country
- Outer Hebrides: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/outer-hebrides — Remote Atlantic islands and white sand beaches
- Isle of Man: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/isle-of-man — Home of the TT and mountain roads
- Scottish Borders: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/scottish-borders — Rolling hills, abbeys, and quiet roads
- Northumberland: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/northumberland — Hadrian's Wall and England's emptiest county
- Jersey: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/jersey — Dramatic coastal cliffs and WWII history
- Guernsey: https://visorup.co.uk/destinations/guernsey — Hidden lanes, rugged coast, island charm

## Motorcycle Touring Setup Guides (20 bikes)
Each guide includes full specifications, UK touring review, scoring (touring/comfort/handling/value/off-road/pillion), strengths and weaknesses, recommended routes, gear recommendations with prices, and touring tips.

## Interactive Tools
- **Route Builder**: Click-to-add waypoints, OSRM road-accurate routing, 800+ POI markers (campsites, bridges, wildlife, fuel stations, viewpoints, biker pubs, scenic roads), scenic/fast mode toggle, GPX export, auto day-splitting
- **AI Trip Planner**: 4-step wizard — enter start location, duration (1-14 days), daily riding hours (2-8h), select interests from 13 POI types, generates optimised multi-day tour with GPX download
- **Elevation Profiles**: Route elevation charts powered by Open-Meteo API
- **Weather Forecasts**: 7-day weather overlay for route planning
- **Fuel Range Warnings**: Tank range input with recommended fuel stops
- **Cost Estimator**: Trip cost calculation with MPG and fuel price inputs

## Points of Interest Database
800+ POIs across the UK covering: campsites, bridges, wildlife lookouts, scenic roads, fuel stations, viewpoints, biker pubs, fossils, and more. All data categorised by region (Scotland, England, Wales, Channel Islands).

## Key Features
- Free GPX downloads for all curated routes
- Dark/light mode toggle
- Mobile-responsive design
- OSRM-powered road-accurate routing
- Cookie consent and GDPR compliance
- Motorcycle-specific ferry booking guides with prices
- Bike-specific touring setup and gear recommendations

## Contact
- Email: hello@visorup.co.uk
- Legal: legal@visorup.co.uk
- Website: https://visorup.co.uk
